response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive full-stack and cross-language experience, his resume shows minimal direct exposure to JVM ecosystems, enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — core requirements for this role. His work with Java is limited to isolated embedded/hardware projects over a decade ago, with no evidence of modern JVM tooling, build integrations, or IDE subsystem development.
strengths: Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong open-source contributions and tooling initiatives
Demonstrated expertise in developer experience and education (workshops, CI/CD)
concerns: No recent or substantial experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise frameworks (Spring, Hibernate)
Lack of demonstrated work on IDEs, language servers, or JVM tooling internals
Primary tech focus is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM-based enterprise systems
